summary: Verified Schedule page refactoring - loads lectures by selected date only. All 6 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed date picker, day name display, lecture count, lecture cards, and Today button all work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend endpoint GET /api/lectures/all-schedule correctly accepts optional ?date=YYYY-MM-DD parameter
✓ Backend defaults to today's date (Yemen timezone UTC+3) when no date provided
✓ Backend returns only lectures for the specified date, not all lectures
✓ Frontend schedule.tsx correctly uses date picker to change selectedDate state
✓ Frontend fetchLectures() correctly passes date parameter to API
✓ Frontend shows correct Arabic day name (الأحد, الإثنين, etc.) based on selected date
✓ Frontend shows lecture count (e.g., '1 محاضرة') matching API response
✓ Frontend shows 'اليوم' (Today) button when viewing non-today date
✓ Lecture card displays: course name, time, teacher, room, status badge, action buttons
seed_data_creation: None - used existing lecture on 2026-04-06 (course: دراسات حضرموت)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule page refactoring is fully verified. The page now loads only the selected date's lectures via GET /api/lectures/all-schedule?date=YYYY-MM-DD. Key test data: date 2026-04-06 has 1 lecture (دراسات حضرموت, 10:00-11:30, teacher Saeed, room قاعة 203). Today (2026-04-07) has 0 lectures.

tests: GET /api/lectures/all-schedule (no date) defaults to today - returns date: 2026-04-07, total: 0
GET /api/lectures/all-schedule?date=2026-04-06 returns 1 lecture with correct details
Lecture response contains all required fields (id, course_name, time, teacher, room, status, etc.)
Shows today's date by default (الثلاثاء، 7 أبريل 2026)
Shows correct Arabic day name (الثلاثاء = Tuesday)
Shows lecture count (0 محاضرة for today)
Empty state shown when no lectures
API called with new date when picker changes
Lecture card displays course name, time, teacher, room, status badge
Action buttons (عرض, إلغاء, حذف) visible on lecture card
Today button appears when viewing non-today date

backend_api_test_results.test_01_schedule_no_date_defaults_to_tod: PASSED - Returns today's date (2026-04-07) with 0 lectures

frontend_ui_test_results.login_flow: PASSED - Admin login successful, redirected to dashboard
frontend_ui_test_results.today_display: PASSED - Shows الثلاثاء، 7 أبريل 2026 with 0 محاضرة
frontend_ui_test_results.date_picker_change: PASSED - Changed to 2026-04-06, shows الإثنين، 6 أبريل 2026
frontend_ui_test_results.lecture_card_display: PASSED - Shows دراسات حضرموت, 10:00-11:30, Saeed, قاعة 203, غائب status
frontend_ui_test_results.today_button: PASSED - اليوم button visible when viewing non-today date
